articles.title: Palantir Stock 2026: Buy or Sell PLTR as AI Platform Drives 61% Revenue Growth Despite High Valuation Concerns
articles.description: NEW YORK — Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR) shares traded near $128 as of April 10, 2026, with Wall Street issuing a Moderate Buy consensus amid explosive commercial momentum from its Artificial Intelligence Platform (AIP) and steady government contr…
